name: Antonio Vivaldi
kid_description: Vivaldi wrote music that sounds like nature, especially the seasons.
parent_summary: Italian Baroque composer known for vivid, programmatic concertos, especially The Four Seasons.

name: Johann Pachelbel
kid_description: He wrote calm music that repeats in a beautiful way.
parent_summary: German Baroque composer best known for Canon in D.

name: Johann Sebastian Bach
kid_description: Bach wrote music that fits together like a puzzle.
parent_summary: One of the greatest composers of all time, known for complex counterpoint and deep structure.
famous_pieces: Toccata and Fugue in D minor

name: Christian Petzold
kid_description: He wrote simple and elegant dance music.
parent_summary: Composer often associated with the Minuet in G major, commonly attributed to Bach.

name: Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart
kid_description: Mozart was a child genius who wrote fun and beautiful music.
parent_summary: A central Classical-era composer known for clarity, elegance, and melodic brilliance.

name: Ludwig van Beethoven
kid_description: Beethoven wrote powerful music with strong emotions.
parent_summary: A revolutionary composer bridging Classical and Romantic eras, known for emotional depth and innovation.

name: Johann Strauss II
kid_description: He wrote music for dancing, especially waltzes.
parent_summary: Austrian composer known as the 'Waltz King,' famous for dance music.

name: Johann Strauss I
kid_description: He wrote music that people clap along to.
parent_summary: Composer of marches and dance music, including the Radetzky March.

name: Johannes Brahms
kid_description: Brahms wrote both big dramatic music and soft lullabies.
parent_summary: German Romantic composer known for rich harmony and emotional depth.

name: Edvard Grieg
kid_description: Grieg wrote music that sounds like nature and stories.
parent_summary: Norwegian composer known for lyrical, folk-inspired works like Peer Gynt.
famous_pieces: In the Hall of the Mountain King

name: Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky
kid_description: Tchaikovsky wrote magical music for ballets and stories.
parent_summary: Russian composer famous for ballets and emotional orchestral music.

name: Claude Debussy
kid_description: Debussy wrote dreamy music that feels like colors and water.
parent_summary: French composer known for impressionistic textures and atmosphere.

name: Camille Saint-Saëns
kid_description: He wrote fun music about animals and beautiful melodies.
parent_summary: French composer known for elegance and works like Carnival of the Animals.

name: Gioachino Rossini
kid_description: Rossini wrote fast and funny music.
parent_summary: Italian opera composer known for energetic overtures and comic operas.

name: Richard Wagner
kid_description: Wagner wrote big and powerful music about heroes.
parent_summary: German composer known for large-scale operas and dramatic orchestration.

name: Giacomo Puccini
kid_description: Puccini wrote emotional songs for singers.
parent_summary: Italian opera composer known for lyrical and emotional arias.

name: Maurice Ravel
kid_description: Ravel wrote music that slowly builds and changes.
parent_summary: French composer known for orchestral color and repetition.

name: Scott Joplin
kid_description: Joplin wrote fun piano music with a bouncy rhythm.
parent_summary: American composer known for ragtime piano music.

name: Erik Satie
kid_description: Satie wrote very simple and calm music.
parent_summary: French composer known for minimal and atmospheric piano works.

name: Sergei Prokofiev
kid_description: Prokofiev wrote music where instruments become characters.
parent_summary: Russian composer known for vivid storytelling and modern orchestral works.

name: Igor Stravinsky
kid_description: Stravinsky wrote exciting and sometimes wild music.
parent_summary: Modernist composer known for rhythmic innovation and bold orchestration.

name: George Gershwin
kid_description: Gershwin mixed jazz and classical music.
parent_summary: American composer blending jazz and classical styles.

name: Aaron Copland
kid_description: Copland wrote music that feels open like wide landscapes.
parent_summary: American composer known for spacious, accessible orchestral music.

name: John Williams
kid_description: He wrote famous movie music about adventures and magic.
parent_summary: Legendary film composer known for orchestral scores.

name: Hans Zimmer
kid_description: Zimmer writes exciting movie music.
parent_summary: Film composer known for powerful and modern orchestral textures.

name: Alan Menken
kid_description: Menken wrote songs for Disney movies.
parent_summary: Composer known for Disney film scores and songs.

name: Kristen Anderson-Lopez & Robert Lopez
kid_description: They wrote songs for Frozen.
parent_summary: Songwriting duo known for Disney hits.
